sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65805" key="melambafh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελαμ-βᾰφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n65805.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dark-dyed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:129" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.129</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. foreg.</sense> </entryFree>
